moments.author: Alex Karp
moments.quote: Something has gone completely wrong in the industry [with AI], stuck in a ‘chillax and waste my time with tokens’ mindset.
moments.why: Palantir’s CEO called out AI token‑based pricing models, sparking debate about value versus hype in the AI industry.

moments.author: Chris Johnson
moments.quote: #cj2kicebucketchallange CJ and Kaden ur up @LeBronJames let’s goooo!!!! #ALS #alsawareness
moments.why: Former NFL star relaunched the viral Ice Bucket Challenge after revealing his ALS diagnosis, driving renewed awareness and engagement.

moments.author: Jaylen Brown
moments.why: Brown’s terse message following his surprising trade to Philadelphia resonated deeply with fans and shifted NBA social conversation overnight.
